meaning: adj.香膏质的,如香油的,有镇静作用的
examples: Serve with red onion, sliced grapefruit and balsamic vinegar.
Balsamic vinegar is aged until it becomes dark and mellow, with a sweet-sour flavor.
My 5- year-old son -- a very picky eater!-- now loves romaine lettuce with balsamic dressing, a major step.
Theirs comes with duck confit, caramelised balsamic onions and a foie gras and red wine sauce.
It's currently being served with a roasted fig and plum mixture, topped with aged balsamic vinegar.
